content:
# Reaction Kinetics

**Summary**: The study of the rates of chemical reactions.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014]] measured reaction kinetics of fresh and spent acid with dolomite rock.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014]] Determines how quickly acid dissolves rock to create wormholes.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014]] Measured via weight loss and concentration changes over time.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Reaction kinetics were measured using a Rotating Disk Apparatus (RDA). ([[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014, p. 61]])
